heading: API Documentation
body:
For more information about creating a `MongoClient` object with the
Node.js driver and specifying options, see the following API documentation:

- [MongoClient](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/MongoClient.html)

- [MongoClientOptions](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/interfaces/MongoClientOptions.html)

- [maxPoolSize](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/interfaces/MongoClientOptions.html#maxPoolSize)

- [maxConnecting](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/interfaces/MongoClientOptions.html#maxConnecting)

- [minPoolSize](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/interfaces/MongoClientOptions.html#minPoolSize)

- [maxIdleTimeMS](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/interfaces/MongoClientOptions.html#maxIdleTimeMS)

- [waitQueueTimeoutMS](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/interfaces/MongoClientOptions.html#waitQueueTimeoutMS)
